---
title: "“Manners and Morals. By Miss Yonge.”"
---

## “Manners and Morals. By Miss Yonge.”

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1884
**Genre:** Non-fiction
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** Girls’ Friendly Society Associates’ Journal and Advertiser. March 1884: 34-35

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
